var href = httpsProtocol + window.location.href.substring(window.location.protocol.length);

var hostname = window.location.hostname;
var httpsHost = httpsHost = (securedPort != "" && securedPort != null) ? hostname + ":" + securedPort : hostname;
href = href.replace(host, httpsHost);
window.location.href = href;
}

<script>
  function sliderHeight() {
    var linkHeight = 0;
    $('.slide').each(function () {
      if ($(this).height() > linkHeight) {
        linkHeight = $(this).height()
      }
    });
    $('.slides').height(linkHeight);
  }

  $(document).ready(function () {
    let currentIndex = 0;
    const slides = $('.slide');
    const totalSlides = slides.length;

    if (totalSlides === 1) {
      $('.next, .prev').hide();
    }

    function showSlide(index) {
      slides.removeClass('active');
      slides.eq(index).addClass('active');
      currentIndex = index;
    }

    sliderHeight();

    $('.next').click(function () {
      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % totalSlides;
      showSlide(nextIndex);
    });

    $('.prev').click(function () {
      const prevIndex = (currentIndex - 1 + totalSlides) % totalSlides;
      showSlide(prevIndex);
    });

    setInterval(function () {
      const nextIndex = (currentIndex + 1) % totalSlides;
      showSlide(nextIndex);
    }, 5000);

    showSlide(currentIndex);
  });

  $(window).resize(function () {
    sliderHeight();
  });
</script>

<script>
$(document).ready(function(){
    const container = $('.carousel-container');
    const items = $('.carousel-item');
    let currentIndex = 0;
    const itemWidth = items.outerWidth(true); // Include margin in width

    // Function to slide to the correct item
    function slideToIndex(index) {
        const newScrollLeft = index * itemWidth;
        container.animate({scrollLeft: newScrollLeft}, 400);
    }

    // Next button click
    $('.next').click(function() {
        if (currentIndex < items.length - 1) {
            currentIndex++;
            slideToIndex(currentIndex);
        }
    });

    // Previous button click
    $('.prev').click(function() {
        if (currentIndex > 0) {
            currentIndex--;
            slideToIndex(currentIndex);
        }
    });
});
</script>
